task: Survey the frontend directory of a SaaS starter kit. The repo root has a frontend/ directory. List its structure, find the main pages/routes, components, state management, API client setup, authentication UI, and any notable UI libraries or patterns in use. Also look at package.json at the repo root for dependencies. Read key config files (vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json) and any page/route files. Provide a comprehensive structured summary of the frontend.
